title: Geraniospermum pinnatum

The classification of Geraniospermum pinnatum is within the kingdom Plantae, and it belongs to the clade Angiosperms. This plant is further classified as a member of the clade Magnoliophyta and the order Ranunculales. Its family classification places it within the order Menispermaceae.
